commands.author: clawsweeper[bot]
commands.repair_reason: - No automated repair is needed; the remaining action is maintainer review and merge judgment for a focused Alibaba auth-provider change.; Cleared: No concrete security or supply-chain issue found; the new request sends existing dashboard cookies only to the configured Alibaba console host and adds no dependencies or secret-handling expansion. (sha=44bcfc078841cfc231736a2e8d7d53f23a7d72a8)
commands.review_summary:
This PR adds an Alibaba Token Plan `tool/user/info.json` `sec_token` fallback, maps expired or failed token payloads to login/credential errors, and extends focused provider tests.

Reproducibility: no. not with a live Alibaba account in this review. Source inspection shows current main lacks the user-info fallback, and the PR adds a stubbed reproduction of that missing path.
commands.review_followup: - No automated repair is needed; the remaining action is maintainer review and merge judgment for a focused Alibaba auth-provider change.

target.title: Fix Alibaba token plan SEC token fallback
target.body: ## Summary - Add a user info JSON fallback for resolving Alibaba Token Plan `sec_token` - Treat `PostonlyOrTokenError` / expired token payloads as `loginRequired` - Cover the new SEC token fallback and token-expired error mapping in tests ## Why Alibaba Token Plan requests can fail when the dashboard HTML preflight does not expose `sec_token`, even though the authenticated user info endpoint can still return it. The API can also return expired-token payloads as `successResponse: false`. Those should prompt login/token refresh instead of surfacing as a generic API error. ## Proof Tested the packaged app from PR head against a real Alibaba Token Plan session. - Commit: `44bcfc07` - App version: `0.32.2 (77)` - Result: Alibaba Token Plan usage loaded successfully - Evidence: The screenshot shows the Token Plan provider loading usage successfully from a real authenticated session after this change. Sensitive values are redacted: - Cookies - `secToken` - Account identifiers - Private request details Additional runtime proof: Captured from a real Alibaba Token Plan session using the packaged app from commit `44bcfc07`: ```text Resolved Alibaba Token Plan sec_token from user info Fetching Alibaba Token Plan usage Alibaba Token Plan HTTP response status=200 ``` Sensitive values were redacted, including cookies, secToken, account identifiers, and private request details. ## Validation - `swift test --filter AlibabaTokenPlan` - `swiftlint --strict --no-cache`
target.author: yanxinxue

commands.reason: PR is not opted into ClawSweeper autofix or automerge
